---
title: "Reproductions"
subtitle: "Key figures from the plant literature, re-run against the current model. Documentation and regression check in one."
listing:
  id: repro
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  include:
    categories: [reproduction]
  fields: [title, description, date, plant-version, plant-ref]
  grid-columns: 2
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.eyebrow}
the literature, re-run
:::

Each card re-creates a published figure from a `plant` paper and places it
beside our re-run, with the source parameters shown and a verdict on
whether it still reproduces. When the model evolves, these are the pages
that tell us what changed.

To add one: copy `posts/_reproduction-template/`, fill in the `paper:`
front-matter block and the verified parameters, set `fidelity:`, render.

::: {#repro}
:::
